name: Singularity-aware Optimization via Randomized Geometric Probing: Towards Stable Non-smooth Optimization

description: arXiv:2605.29547v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Deep learning optimization relies heavily on the assumption of smooth loss landscapes, a condition systematically violated by modern architectures due to non-smooth components such as ReLU activations and quantization operators. In such non-smooth regimes, adaptive optimizers such as Adam suffer from gradient chattering, violent oscillat...
author: Ruoran Xu, Borong She, Xiaobo Jin, Qiufeng Wang
